text: Thanks for calling Pivot Point Orthopedics. Part of pretty good AI. Am I speaking with Alex?
No, this is Jordan Smith. I’d like to reschedule my appointment, please.
Please provide the full name and date of birth of the patient. You'd like to reschedule for
Sure, my name is Jordan Smith and my date of birth is November 4, 1995.
Just to confirm, I have. Your name is Jordan Smith and your date of birth is November 4th. 1995, is that correct?
Would you like to use your phone number to look up your record? If so, please tell me the number you have on file with us, if you're not sure, I can confirm your name and date of birth. Again,
You can use my phone number, which is 555-123-4567.
I have your phone number is 5551234567 and your date of birth is November 4th. 1995, is that correct?
